key_incorrect: INCORRECT: 'BNM reported e-wallet transactions reached RM48.3 billion in 2025' — BNM Annual Report 2025 shows TOTAL e-payment transactions of 18.4 billion COUNT and retail e-payment transaction VALUE of RM831 billion. The RM48.3B figure for 'e-wallet transactions' does not match any verified BNM publication.

INCORRECT: 'PDPA has carve-outs for financial services and credit scoring' — PDPA expressly applies to commercial transactions including banking and financing. Only carve-outs are Federal/State Governments and credit reporting business under Act 710. Not a broad financial-services exemption.
INCORRECT: '14 categories of third parties' for data sharing — no statutory rule or framework supports this number.
MISLEADING: 'BNM should force interoperability' — DuitNow QR is ALREADY Malaysia's national interoperable QR standard per BNM and PayNet. Argument premise is wrong.
key_unverified: 56 licensed providers — no primary count located
82% top-3 market share — no primary table
42 small providers handling <5% — no primary distribution data
RM1.8 billion operator losses — not verified; in fact TNG Digital announced 29 Sept 2025 it had been consistently profitable since Q3 2024
Cashback subsidies exceed transaction revenue — no audited industrywide source
BNM expects 8-12 viable providers by 2028 — not in any BNM publication located
28% rural vs 74% urban adoption — no primary survey
4.2 million rural cash-dependent — no primary source
85% cash transactions in East Malaysia hawker stalls — no primary source
key_misleading: MISLEADING: '22 million users' figure appears to align with TNG eWallet's late-2024 verified user count, NOT all Malaysian e-wallet users collectively. TNG announced 24M+ verified in 2025.
omitted_facts: BNM Annual Report 2025: total e-payment transactions grew 25% to 18.4 billion in 2025; average e-payments per Malaysian rose to 538
BNM AR 2025: retail e-payment transaction value rose 19% to RM831 billion
BNM AR 2025: average e-money transaction size rose to RM43 in 2025 from RM33 in 2024
BNM AR 2025: DuitNow QR transaction volume doubled to 3 billion in 2025; ~3 million DuitNow QR touchpoints by end-2025
DuitNow QR is already BNM's national interoperable standard supporting payments across participating banks and e-wallets
PDPA section 8 restricts disclosure beyond collection purpose unless consent or another lawful basis applies
PDPA scope includes banking and financing; only specific government processing and CRA-regulated credit reporting are excluded
TNG Digital announced consistently profitable since Q3 2024 (29 Sept 2025)
source_assessment: Narrow source base — BNM AR 2025, BNM payment data, PDPA 2010, and 'public commentary'. No specific BNM tables, no operator financials, no audited market-share data, no named rural surveys. Source spread low in diversity and traceability.
overall_assessment: Not publication-ready. Most concrete numerical claims are unverified, several PDPA legal claims are materially wrong, and the interoperability framing ignores DuitNow QR's existing role. Needs substantial rebuild around verified BNM data, precise PDPA sections, and named operator disclosures.
